title: tragacantha nummularia
intro: Tragacantha nummularia, also known as Tragacanth or Astragalus gummifer, is a perennial plant native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. It is a type of legume that produces a natural gum, known as tragacanth, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha nummularia include soothing digestive issues, reducing coughs and sore throats, and even treating skin conditions such as eczema. The plant is often prepared as a powder or extract, and can be found in various herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and topical creams.
